problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
mechanism: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient
hypothesis: If Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient is applied to rapidly, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
